heading: State grant, rebate, and loan programs
label: 16133 State grant, rebate, and loan programs

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Subject to the availability of adequate appropriations, the Administrator shall use 30 percent of the funds made available for a fiscal year under this part to support grant, rebate, and loan programs administered by States that are designed to achieve significant reductions in diesel emissions.

children.label: A
children.text: the process and forms for applications;

children.label: B
children.text: permissible uses of funds received; and

children.label: C
children.text: the cost-effectiveness of various emission reduction technologies eligible to be carried out using funds provided under this section; and

children.label: A
children.text: an annual deadline for submission of the applications;

children.label: B
children.text: a process by which the Administrator shall approve or disapprove each application; and

children.label: C
children.text: a streamlined process by which a State may renew an application described in paragraph (1) for subsequent fiscal years.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: For each fiscal year, the Administrator shall allocate among States for which applications are approved by the Administrator under subsection (b)(2)(B) funds made available to carry out this section for the fiscal year.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Except as provided in subparagraphs (B) and (C), using not more than 20 percent of the funds made available to carry out this part for a fiscal year, the Administrator shall provide to each State qualified for an allocation for the fiscal year an allocation equal to ⁄ of the funds made available for that fiscal year for distribution to States under this paragraph.153

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: Except as provided in clause (ii), Guam, the United States Virgin Islands, American Samoa, and the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands shall collectively receive an allocation equal to ⁄ of the funds made available for that fiscal year for distribution to States under this subsection, divided equally among those 4 States.153

children.heading: Exception
children.label: ii Exception
children.text: If any State described in clause (i) does not qualify for an allocation under this paragraph, the share of funds otherwise allocated for that State under clause (i) shall be reallocated pursuant to subparagraph (C).

children.label: i
children.text: the proportion that the population of the State bears to the population of all States described in paragraph (1); by

children.label: ii
children.text: the amount otherwise allocatable to the nonqualifying State under this paragraph.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: If a State agrees to match the allocation provided to the State under paragraph (2) for a fiscal year, the Administrator shall provide to the State for the fiscal year an additional amount equal to 50 percent of the allocation of the State under paragraph (2).

children.label: i
children.text: may not use funds received under this part to pay a matching share required under this subsection; and

children.label: ii
children.text: shall not be required to provide a matching share for any additional amount received under subparagraph (A).

children.heading: Unclaimed funds
children.label: 4 Unclaimed funds
children.text: Any funds that are not claimed by a State for a fiscal year under this subsection shall be used to carry out .section 16132 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subject to paragraphs (2) and (3) and, to the extent practicable, the priority areas listed in , a State shall use any funds provided under this section to develop and implement such grant, rebate, and low-cost revolving loan programs in the State as are appropriate to meet State needs and goals relating to the reduction of diesel emissions.section 16132(c)(3) of this title

children.heading: Apportionment of funds
children.label: 2 Apportionment of funds
children.text: The chief executive of a State that receives funding under this section may determine the portion of funds to be provided as grants, rebates, or loans.

children.label: A
children.text: a certified engine configuration; or

children.label: B
children.text: a verified technology.

children.heading: Priority
children.label: 4 Priority
children.text: In providing grants, rebates, and loans under this section, a State shall use the priorities in .section 16132(c)(4) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: for rebates, grants, and loans provided to the owner of a diesel vehicle or fleet, the total number and dollar amount of rebates, grants, or loans provided, as well as a breakdown of the technologies funded through the rebates, grants, or loans; and

children.label: B
children.text: for other rebates, grants, and loans, a description of each application for which the grant, rebate, or loan is provided.
